productDisplayName: Fila Men Lobato Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Lobato makes for a great casual shoe.UpperLeather upper with stitch detailingLacing system for a snug, customised FitTextile inner lining for the collar and tongue to offer optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with brand logo styled lugs and ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point at the big toe mound with brand logo for easy 180 degree movement of the footShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
